description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wall-mounted radiator with a minimalist design, featuring six evenly spaced vertical black columns set against a flat, light-colored rectangular backplate. The radiator's columns are tubular and run the full height of the panel, providing a modern and efficient heat-dissipating surface. The mounting brackets and pipe connections are subtly integrated at the bottom, maintaining a clean and streamlined appearance. The side profile reveals the radiator's slim depth, with the columns protruding slightly from the backplate. There are no visible decorative grilles or covers, emphasizing a functional and contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction suggests robust metal materials, likely steel, for effective heat transfer and durability.
description: A tall, wall-mounted radiator with six vertical black columns on a light rectangular backplate, featuring a slim and modern design. The radiator is minimalist, with exposed tubular columns and subtle mounting hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing six vertical black columns evenly spaced on a light rectangular backplate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the slight protrusion of the columns from the backplate.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, flat backplate with no visible columns or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim depth and the columns' protrusion from the backplate.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom, horizontally aligned
